description: Use this API routine to modify the voltage droop control in the working case, or to add a new voltage droop control to the working case (see PSSE Program Operation Manual. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.3.0. ierr = voltage_droop_data(name, intgar, realar)

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Name of the voltage droop control for which data is to be specified. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: intgar
parameters.description: An array of two elements specifying array of 2 elements specifying. (input).

parameters.name: realar
parameters.description: An array of seven elements specifying array of 7 elements specifying. (input).

intgar.description: STATUS, voltage droop control status (0, 1) (0 by default).
REGBUS, regulated bus of voltage droop control (0 by default).

realar.description: QMAX, upper Q limit of voltage droop control (1.0 by default).
QDB, Q output when voltage is within deadband (0.0 by default).
QMIN, lower Q limit of voltage droop control (-1.0 by default).
VLOW, lower voltage limit of voltage droop control (0.9 by default).
VDBLOW, lower voltage deadband limit of voltage droop control (0.98 by default).
VDBHIGH, higher voltage deadband limit of voltage droop control (1.02 by default).
VHIGH, higher voltage limit of voltage droop control (1.1 by default).

error_codes.description: voltage droop control table is full.
blank voltage droop control name is invalid.
voltage droop control characteristic curve is invalid.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.

data error, warning and information messages; one or more of: - invalid voltage droop control status - qmax is less than qmin - vhigh is less than vlow - vdbhigh is less than vdblow - vdblow is less than vlow.
